LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GOSU, LLC, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT FAILED TO FILE A MEET AND CONFER DECLARATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JANUARY 19, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Roman Otkupman, Esq., OTKUPMAN LAW FIRM, A LAW CORPORATION (818) 293-5623 Roman@OLFLA.com
Attorneys for Plaintiff, Edith Arango, on behalf of herself and all others similarly situated, and on behalf of the general public
Dylan Hackett, Esq., THE HACKETT LAW FIRM, 415-410-9931, dylanhackett@hackettfirm.com for Defendant Gosu, LLC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GOSU, LLC, DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Defendant failed to file a meet and confer declaration in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by January 19, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
